records.Question__c: A company is implementing a new Mule application that supports a set of critical functions driven by a rest API enabled, claims payment rules engine hosted on oracle ERP. As designed the mule application requires many data transformation operations as it performs its batch processing logic.The company wants to leverage and reuse as many of its existing java-based capabilities (classes, objects, data model etc.) as possible What approach should be considered when implementing required data mappings and transformations between Mule application and Oracle ERP in the new Mule application?
records.A__c: From the mule application, transform via theXSLT model
records.B__c: Transform by calling any suitable Java class from Dataweave
records.C__c: Create a new metadata RAML classes in Mule from the appropriate Java objects and then perform transformations via Dataweave
records.D__c: Invoke any of the appropriate Java methods directly, create metadata RAML classes and then perform required transformations via Dataweave
records.Comment__c:
Leveraging existing Java-based capabilities for data transformations in a Mule application can enhance efficiency and reuse. Here’s how to integrate Java classes for transformations:


Create Java Classes:

Configure DataWeave to Call Java Methods:

%dw 2.0 import * from my.package.ClassName output application/json --- { transformedData: ClassName::methodName(payload) }


Perform Transformations:

Test Transformations:

This approach allows for seamless integration of existing Java logic into Mule applications, leveraging DataWeave’s power for comprehensive data transformations.


References


MuleSoft Documentation: DataWeave and Java Integration

MuleSoft Documentation: Using J



ava with Mule

records.Question__c: A company is planning to extend its Mule APIs to the Europe region. Currently all new applications are deployed to Cloudhub in the US region following this naming convention{API name}-{environment}. for example, Orders-SAPI-dev, Orders-SAPI-prod etc.Considering there is no network restriction to block communications between API's, what strategy should be implemented in order to apply the same new API's running in the EU region of CloudHub as well to minimize latency between API's and target users and systems in Europe?
records.A__c: Set region property to Europe (eu-de) in API manager for all the mule application No need to change the naming convention
records.B__c: Set region property to Europe (eu-de) in runtime manager for all the mule application No need to change the naming convention
records.C__c: Set region property to Europe (eu-de) in runtime manager for all the mule application Change the naming convention to {API name}-{environment}-{region} and communicate this change to the consuming applications and users
records.D__c: Set region property to Europe (eu-de) in API manager for all the mule application Change the naming convention to {API name}-{environment}-{region} and communicate this change to the consuming applications and users
records.Comment__c:
最適な選択肢は **(C)** です。


理由:

- **リージョン設定**: ヨーロッパ地域でのAPIの実行を確実にするために、すべてのMuleアプリケーションのリージョンプロパティをRuntime ManagerでEurope (eu-de)に設定する必要があります。これにより、APIがヨーロッパのターゲットユーザーやシステムに対して最適なパフォーマンスを発揮します。

- **命名規則の変更**: 新しいリージョンを含む命名規則（{API name}-{environment}-{region}）に変更することで、APIがどのリージョンで実行されているかを明確に識別できます。これにより、消費アプリケーションやユーザーに対しても一貫性が保たれ、混乱を避けることができます。


このアプローチにより、APIのパフォーマンスと可視性が向上し、ユーザーやシステム間のコミュニケーションが円滑になります。

records.Question__c: A company is planning to migrate its deployment environment from on-premises cluster to a Runtime Fabric (RTF) cluster. It also has a requirement to enable Mule applications deployed to a Mule runtime instance to store and share data across application replicas and restarts.How can these requirements be met?
records.A__c: Configure Persistence Gateway in any of the servers using Mule Object Store
records.B__c: Install the object store pod on one of the cluster nodes
records.C__c: Anypoint object store V2 to share data between replicas in the RTF cluster
records.D__c: Configure Persistent Gateway at the RTF
records.Comment__c:
最適な選択肢は **(D): Configure Persistent Gateway at the RTF** です。


理由:

Persistent GatewayをRTF（Runtime Fabric）で設定することで、Muleアプリケーションがデータを保存し、アプリケーションのレプリカや再起動間でデータを共有することができます¹。これにより、アプリケーションの可用性とデータの一貫性が確保されます。


¹: [MuleSoft Documentation](https://docs.mulesoft.com/runtime-fabric/latest/configuring-runtime-fabric)


ソース: Copilot との会話、 2024/7/24

(1) Configuring Runtime Fabric | MuleSoft Documentation. https://docs.mulesoft.com/runtime-fabric/latest/configuring-runtime-fabric.

(2) Anypoint Runtime Fabric Overview | MuleSoft Documentation. https://docs.mulesoft.com/runtime-fabric/latest/.

(3) Deploying Mule Apps to Runtime Fabric Using Runtime Manager. https://docs.mulesoft.com/runtime-fabric/latest/deploy-to-runtime-fabric.

(4) Deploying Mule Apps to Runtime Fabric | MuleSoft .... https://docs.mulesoft.com/runtime-fabric/latest/deploy-index.


Mule の RTF は、MuleSoft Runtime Fabric の略です。これは、MuleSoft の Anypoint Platform の一部で、ハイブリッドクラウド環境やオンプレミス環境でのアプリケーションのデプロイと管理を簡素化するためのインフラストラクチャです。

主な特徴

  • スケーラビリティ: アプリケーションの負荷に応じて自動的にスケールアップやスケールダウンが可能です。
  • 高可用性: 複数のノードにアプリケーションをデプロイすることで、システムの冗長性と可用性を確保します。
  • セキュリティ: データの暗号化やアクセス制御など、セキュリティ機能が強化されています。
  • 監視と管理: デプロイされたアプリケーションのパフォーマンスや状態をリアルタイムで監視し、管理するためのツールが提供されています12.

MuleSoft の RTF は、企業が複雑な統合プロジェクトを効率的に管理し、迅速に展開するのに役立つ強力なツールです。

何か他に知りたいことがあれば教えてくださいね！

records.Question__c: A corporation has deployed multiple mule applications implementing various public and private API's to different cloudhub workers. These API's arc Critical applications that must be highly available and in line with the reliability SLA as defined by stakeholders.How can API availability (liveliness or readiness) be monitored so that Ops team receives outage notifications?
records.A__c: Configure alerts with failure conditions in runtime manager
records.B__c: Configure alerts failure conditions in API manager
records.C__c: Use any point functional monitoring test API's functional behavior
records.D__c: Enable monitoring of individual applications from Anypoint monitoring
records.Comment__c:
最適な選択肢は **(D): Enable monitoring of individual applications from Anypoint monitoring** です。


理由:

Anypoint Monitoringを使用することで、各アプリケーションの詳細な監視が可能となり、APIの可用性（稼働状態や準備状態）をリアルタイムで把握できます。これにより、Opsチームは即座に障害通知を受け取ることができ、迅速な対応が可能となります。他の選択肢も有効ですが、Anypoint Monitoringは特に包括的な監視機能を提供するため、最適な選択肢となります。

records.Question__c: A customer wants to use the mapped diagnostic context (MDC) and logging variables to enrich its logging and improve tracking by providing more context in the logs.The customer also wants to improve the throughput and lower the latency of message processing.As an Mulesoft integration architect can you advise, what should the customer implement to meet these requirements?
records.A__c: Useasync logger at the level equal to DEBUG orTRACEand use patternlayout with [%MDC] in the log4j2.xml configuration file and then configure the logging variables
records.B__c: Use synchronous logging at the INFO DEBUG or Trace level and use pattern layout with [%MDC] in the log4j2.xml configuration file and then configure the logging variables
records.C__c: Use synchronous logging and use pattern layout with [%MDC] in the log4j2.xml configuration file and then configure the logging variables
records.D__c: Useasync logger at the level greater than INFO and use pattern layout with [%MDC] in the log4j2,xml configuration file and then configure the logging variables
records.Comment__c:
最適な選択肢は **(D)** です。


理由:

非同期ロギング（async logger）は、メッセージ処理のスループットを向上させ、レイテンシーを低減するために推奨されます²。また、ログレベルをINFO以上に設定することで、必要な情報を適切にログに記録しつつ、パフォーマンスへの影響を最小限に抑えることができます。さらに、MDC（Mapped Diagnostic Context）を使用することで、ログにより多くのコンテキスト情報を追加し、トラッキングを改善することができます¹。


¹: [MDC Logging | MuleSoft Documentation](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mule-runtime/latest/logging-mdc)

²: [Configuring Logging | MuleSoft Documentation](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mule-runtime/4.4/logging-in-mule)


ソース: Copilot との会話、 2024/7/24

(1) Configuring Logging | MuleSoft Documentation. https://docs.mulesoft.com/mule-runtime/4.4/logging-in-mule.

(2) MDC Logging | MuleSoft Documentation. https://docs.mulesoft.com/mule-runtime/latest/logging-mdc.

(3) Best Practices: Performance Tuning Real Life MuleSoft APIs. https://dzone.com/articles/design-best-practices-for-real-life-mulesoft-apis.

(4) Performance Tuning Guide | MuleSoft Documentation. https://docs.mulesoft.com/mule-runtime/latest/tuning-guide.

records.Question__c: A global, high-volume shopping Mule application is being built and will be deployed to CloudHub. To improve performance, the Mule application uses a Cache scope that maintains cache state in a CloudHub object store. Web clients will access the Mule application over HTTP from all around the world, with peak volume coinciding with business hours in the web client's geographic location. To achieve optimal performance, what Anypoint Platform region should be chosen for the CloudHub object store?
records.A__c: Choose the same region as to where the Mule application is deployed
records.B__c: Choose the US-West region, the only supported region for CloudHub object stores
records.C__c: Choose the geographically closest available region for each web client
records.D__c: Choose a region that is the traffic-weighted geographic center of all web clients
records.Comment__c:
*Explanation:CloudHub object store should be in same region where the Mule application is deployed. This will give optimal performance.Before learning about Cache scope and object store in Mule 4 we understand what is in general Caching is and other related things.WHAT DOES "CACHING" MEAN?Caching is the process of storing frequently used data in memory, file system or database which saves processing time and load if it would have to be accessed from original source location every time.In computing, a cache is a high-speed data storage layer which stores a subset of data, so that future requests for that data are served up faster than is possible by accessing the data's primary storage location. Caching allows you to efficiently reuse previously retrieved or computed data.How does Caching work?The data in a cache is generally stored in fast access hardware such as RAM (Random-access memory) and may also be used in correlation with a software component. A cache's primary purpose is to increase data retrieval performance by reducing the need to access the underlying slower storage layer.Caching in MULE 4In Mule 4 caching can be achieved in mule using cache scope and/or object-store. Cache scope internally uses Object Store to store the data.What is Object StoreObject Store lets applications store data and states across batch processes, Mule components, and applications, from within an application. If used on cloud hub, the object store is shared between applications deployed on Cluster.Cache Scope is used in below-mentioned cases:* Need to store the whole response from the outbound processor* Data returned from the outbound processor does not change very frequently* As Cache scope internally handle the cache hit and cache miss scenarios it is more readable Object Store is used in below-mentioned cases:* Need to store custom/intermediary data* To store watermarks* Sharing the data/stage across applications, schedulers, batch.If CloudHub object store is in same region where the Mule application is deployed it will aid in fast access of data and give optimal performance.



最適な選択肢は **(A) Choose the same region as to where the Mule application is deployed** です。


理由:

CloudHubのオブジェクトストアは、Muleアプリケーションがデプロイされているリージョンと同じリージョンに配置することで、データの読み書きの遅延を最小限に抑えることができます¹。これにより、キャッシュのパフォーマンスが向上し、全体的なアプリケーションの応答時間が短縮されます²。特に、グローバルな高トラフィックのショッピングアプリケーションでは、キャッシュの効率が重要です。


¹: https://docs.mulesoft.com/object-store/

²: https://docs.mulesoft.com/jp/cloudhub/


ソース: Copilot との会話、 2024/7/24

(1) Object Store v2 Overview | MuleSoft Documentation. https://docs.mulesoft.com/object-store/.

(2) CloudHub の概要 | MuleSoft ドキュメント. https://docs.mulesoft.com/jp/cloudhub/.

(3) MuleSoft Integration and Platform Architect Certification .... https://www.folkstalk.com/2019/11/mulesoft-integration-and-platform.html.

(4) FAQ: Object Store v2 | MuleSoft Documentation. https://docs.mulesoft.com/object-store/osv2-faq.

(5) Runtime FabricでPersistenceオブジェクトストア #MuleSoft - Qiita. https://qiita.com/aaiso/items/e64e2901c4f070ab0a79.

records.Question__c: A global organization operates datacenters in many countries. There are private network links between these datacenters because all business data (but NOT metadata) must be exchanged over these private network connections.The organization does not currently use AWS in any way.The strategic decision has Just been made to rigorously minimize IT operations effort and investment going forward.What combination of deployment options of the Anypoint Platform control plane and runtime plane(s) best serves this organization at the start of this strategic journey?
records.A__c: MuleSoft-hosted Anypoint Platform control plane Customer-hosted runtime plane in each datacenter Hybrid is the best choice to start. Mule hosted Control plane and Customer hosted Runtime to start with. Once they mature in cloud migration, everything can be in Mule hosted.
records.B__c: MuleSoft-hosted Anypoint Platform control plane Customer-hosted runtime plane in multiple AWS regions
records.C__c: Anypoint Platform - Private Cloud Edition Customer-hosted runtime plane in each datacenter
records.D__c: MuleSoft-hosted Anypoint Platform control plane CloudHub Shared Worker Cloud in multiple AWS regions
records.Comment__c:
最適な選択肢は **(A)** です。


**理由:**

選択肢 (A) は、MuleSoft がホストする Anypoint Platform のコントロールプレーンと、各データセンターにある顧客がホストするランタイムプレーンの組み合わせです。この構成は、以下の理由から最適です。


1. **IT運用の最小化**: MuleSoft がコントロールプレーンをホストすることで、運用管理の負担が軽減されます。これにより、IT運用の労力と投資を最小限に抑えることができます。

2. **プライベートネットワークの利用**: 各データセンターに顧客がホストするランタイムプレーンを配置することで、ビジネスデータがプライベートネットワークリンクを介して交換される要件を満たします。

3. **クラウド移行の柔軟性**: 初期段階ではハイブリッド構成を採用し、クラウド移行が進むにつれて、すべてを MuleSoft がホストする構成に移行することが可能です。この柔軟性は、将来的なクラウド戦略の変更にも対応できます。


このように、選択肢 (A) は、現在の要件を満たしつつ、将来的なクラウド移行の柔軟性も提供するため、最適な選択肢となります。


ソース: Copilot との会話、 2024/7/24

records.Question__c: A marketing organization is designing a Mule application to process campaign dat a. The Mule application will periodically check for a file in a SFTP location and process the records in the file. The size of the file can vary from 10MB to 5GB. Due to the limited availabiltty of vCores, the Mule application is deployed to a single CloudHub worker configured with vCore size 0.2.The application must transform and send different formats of this file to three different downstream SFTP locations.What is the most idiomatic (used for its intended purpose) and performant way to configure the SFTP operations or event sources to process the large files to support these deployment requirements?
records.A__c: Use a file-stored non-repeatable stream
records.B__c: Use a file-stored repeatable stream
records.C__c: Use an in-memory repeatable stream
records.D__c: Use an in-memory non-repeatable stream
records.Comment__c:
https://www.examtopics.com/discussions/mulesoft/view/93811-exam-mcia-level-1-topic-1-question-99-discussion/


I'll go with D. Use a file-stored repeatable stream. File-stored, because heap memory assigned to 0.2 vCores is 1 GB. If the size of the processed file is more than 1 GB and the disc storage isn't available, the application will crash. So the disc (file) storage is needed. Repeatable, since there are three downstream SFTP locations which expect different file formats, it can be assumed, that the mule application needs to access the stored data three times to transform them into three different formats.

records.Question__c: A Mule application contains a Batch Job with two Batch Steps (Batch_Step_l and Batch_Step_2). A payload with 1000 records is received by the Batch Job.How many threads are used by the Batch Job to process records, and how does each Batch Step process records within the Batch Job?
records.A__c: Each Batch Job uses SEVERAL THREADS for the Batch Steps Each Batch Step instance receives ONE record at a time as the payload, and RECORDS are processed IN PARALLEL within and between the two Batch Steps
records.B__c: Each Batch Job uses a SINGLE THREAD for all Batch steps Each Batch step instance receives ONE record at a time as the payload, and RECORDS are processed IN ORDER, first through Batch_Step_l and then through Batch_Step_2
records.C__c: Each Batch Job uses a SINGLE THREAD to process a configured block size of record Each Batch Step instance receives A BLOCK OF records as the payload, and BLOCKS of records are processed IN ORDER
records.D__c: Each Batch Job uses SEVERAL THREADS for the Batch Steps Each Batch Step instance receives ONE record at a time as the payload, and BATCH STEP INSTANCES execute IN PARALLEL to process records and Batch Steps in ANY order as fast as possible
records.Comment__c:
* Each Batch Job uses SEVERAL THREADS for the Batch Steps* Each Batch Step instance receives ONE record at a time as the payload. It's not received in a block, as it does not wait for multiple records to be completed before moving to next batch step. (So Option D is out of choice)* RECORDS are processed IN PARALLEL within and between the two Batch Steps.* RECORDS are not processed in order. Let's say if second record completes batch_step_1 before record 1, then it moves to batch_step_2 before record 1. (So option C and D are out of choice)* A batch job is the scope element in an application in which Mule processes a message payload as a batch of records. The term batch job is inclusive of all three phases of processing: Load and Dispatch, Process, and On Complete.* A batch job instance is an occurrence in a Mule application whenever a Mule flow executes a batch job. Mule creates the batch job instance in the Load and Dispatch phase. Every batch job instance is identified internally using a unique String known as batch job instance id.





最適な選択肢は **(A)** です。


**理由**:

Muleのバッチジョブは、複数のスレッドを使用してレコードを並行処理します。各バッチステップは1回に1つのレコードを受け取り、バッチステップ内およびバッチステップ間でレコードが並行して処理されます¹²。これにより、処理の効率が向上し、大量のデータを迅速に処理することができます。


¹: https://docs.mulesoft.com/jp/mule-runtime/4.4/batch-processing-concept

²: https://docs.mulesoft.com/mule-runtime/latest/tuning-batch-processing


他に質問があれば教えてくださいね。


ソース: Copilot との会話、 2024/7/24

(2) Batch Processing | MuleSoft Documentation. https://docs.mulesoft.com/mule-runtime/latest/tuning-batch-processing.

(3) Dealing with a large number of records by Batch Processing .... https://bing.com/search?q=Mule+application+Batch+Job+thread+processing.

records.Question__c:
A mule application designed to fulfil two requirements


a) Processing files are synchronously from an FTPS server to a back-end database using VM intermediary queues for load balancing VM events


b) Processing a medium rate of records from a source to a target system using batch job scope Considering the processing reliability requirements for FTPS files


how should VM queues be configured for processing files as well as for the batch job scope if the application is deployed to Cloudhub workers?
records.A__c:
Use Cloud hub persistent VM queue for FTPS file processing

There is no need to configure VM queues for the batch jobs scope as it uses by default the worker's JVM memory for VM queueing
records.B__c:
Use Cloud hub persistent VM queues for FTPS file processing

Disable VM queue for the batch job scope
records.C__c:
Use VM connector persistent queues for FTPS file processing

Disable VM queue for the batch job scope
records.D__c:
Use Cloud hub persistent queues for FTPS files processing

There is no need to configure VM queues for the batch jobs scope as it uses by default the worker's disc for VM queueing
records.Comment__c:
https://www.dumpspedia.com/salesforce-certified-mulesoft-integration-architect-1-sp24-exam-dumps.html


説明：CloudHub上のVMイベントをロードバランシングするVM中間キューを使用して、FTPSサーバーからバックエンドデータベースへ同期的にファイルを処理する場合、信頼性が重要です。 CloudHubの永続キューをFTPSファイル処理に使用し、ワーカーの障害や再起動時にデータが失われないようにする必要があります。 これらのキューはメッセージを永続的に保存するため、耐久性と信頼性を提供します。 バッチジョブのスコープでは、追加のVMキューを設定する必要はありません。 デフォルトでは、CloudHubのバッチジョブはVMキューイングにワーカーのディスクを使用します。これはソースからターゲットシステムへの中レートのレコード処理に信頼性があります。 このアプローチにより、バッチ・ジョブのスコープを追加設定することなく、FTPSファイル処理とバッチ・ジョブ処理の両方が信頼性要件を満たすことが保証されます。 参考文献 CloudHubおよびVM Queues Anypoint Platformベスト・プラクティスに関するMuleSoftドキュメント

records.Question__c:
A Mule application is being designed to do the following:


Step 1: Read a SalesOrder message from a JMS queue, where each SalesOrder consists of a header and a list of SalesOrderLineltems.


Step 2: Insert the SalesOrder header and each SalesOrderLineltem into different tables in an RDBMS.


Step 3: Insert the SalesOrder header and the sum of the prices of all its SalesOrderLineltems into a table In a different RDBMS.


No SalesOrder message can be lost and the consistency of all SalesOrder-related information in both RDBMSs must be ensured at all times.What design choice (including choice of transactions) and order of steps addresses these requirements?
records.A__c:
Read the JMS message (NOT in an XA transaction)

2) Perform EACH DB insert in a SEPARATE DB transaction

3) Acknowledge the JMS message
records.B__c:
Read and acknowledge the JMS message (NOT in an XA transaction)

2) In a NEW XA transaction, perform BOTH DB inserts
records.C__c:
Read the JMS message (NOT in an XA transaction)

2) Perform BOTH DB inserts in ONE DB transaction

3) Acknowledge the JMS message
records.D__c:
Read the JMS message in an XA transaction

2) In the SAME XA transaction, perform BOTH DB inserts but do NOT acknowledge the JMS message
records.Comment__c:
最適な選択肢は **(D)** です。


**理由**:

選択肢(D)は、XAトランザクションを使用してJMSメッセージの読み取りと両方のデータベース挿入を同じトランザクション内で行います。これにより、以下の点が保証されます：


1. **メッセージの一貫性**: XAトランザクションを使用することで、JMSメッセージの読み取りとデータベース挿入が一貫した状態で行われます。これにより、どちらかの操作が失敗した場合でも、全体がロールバックされるため、データの一貫性が保たれます。


2. **メッセージの損失防止**: JMSメッセージをXAトランザクション内で読み取ることで、メッセージが確実に処理されるまでキューに残ります。これにより、メッセージの損失が防止されます。


3. **データベースの整合性**: 両方のデータベース挿入が同じトランザクション内で行われるため、どちらかの挿入が失敗した場合でも、全体がロールバックされ、データベースの整合性が保たれます。


このように、選択肢(D)はメッセージの損失を防ぎ、データの一貫性と整合性を確保するための最適な方法です。

MuleSoftのJMSコネクタ（JMS Connector）は、Java Message Service（JMS）を使用してメッセージを送受信するためのツールです。JMSは、分散型アプリケーションの異なるコンポーネント間の通信を疎結合、高信頼性、および非同期にするために広く使用されているAPIです¹²。


JMSコネクタの主な機能には以下が含まれます：

- 特定の宛先でのパブリッシュおよびサブスクライブパターンのサポート

- 特定の宛先でのリスンおよび応答パターンのサポート

- JMS 2.0、1.1、および1.0.2仕様に完全に準拠¹


このコネクタを使用することで、JMS仕様を実装する任意のメッセージサービスのキューおよびトピックとの間でメッセージを送受信できます¹。

records.Question__c: A Mule application is being designed to perform product orchestration. The Mule application needs to join together the responses from an Inventory API and a Product Sales History API with the least latency.To minimize the overall latency, what is the most idiomatic (used for its intended purpose) design to call each API request in the Mule application?
records.A__c: Call each API request in a separate route of a Parallel For Each scope
records.B__c: Call each API request in a separate Async scope
records.C__c: Call each API request in a separate route of a Scatter-Gather
records.D__c: Call each API request in a separate lookup call from a DataWeave reduce operator
records.Comment__c:
最適な選択肢は **(C): Call each API request in a separate route of a Scatter-Gather** です。


理由：

Scatter-Gatherは、複数のAPIリクエストを並行して実行し、それぞれのレスポンスを収集するために設計されています。これにより、全体のレイテンシーを最小限に抑えることができます。各APIリクエストが独立して実行されるため、最も遅いリクエストの完了を待つ必要がなく、全体の処理時間が短縮されます。Scatter-Gatherは、複数の非同期処理を効率的に管理するための最適な方法です。

records.Question__c: A Mule application is being designed To receive nightly a CSV file containing millions of records from an external vendor over SFTP, The records from the file need to be validated, transformed. And then written to a database. Records can be inserted into the database in any order.In this use case, what combination of Mule components provides the most effective and performant way to write these records to the database?
records.A__c: Use a Parallel for Each scope to Insert records one by one into the database
records.B__c: Use a Scatter-Gather to bulk insert records into the database
records.C__c: Use a Batch job scope to bulk insert records into the database.
records.D__c: Use a DataWeave map operation and an Async scope to insert records one by one into the database.
records.Comment__c: Correct answer is Use a Batch job scope to bulk insert records into the database* Batch Job is most efficient way to manage millions of records.A few points to note here are as follows :Reliability: If you want reliabilty while processing the records, i.e should the processing survive a runtime crash or other unhappy scenarios, and when restarted process all the remaining records, if yes then go for batch as it uses persistent queues.Error Handling: In Parallel for each an error in a particular route will stop processing the remaining records in that route and in such case you'd need to handle it using on error continue, batch process does not stop during such error instead you can have a step for failures and have a dedicated handling in it.Memory footprint: Since question said that there are millions of records to process, parallel for each will aggregate all the processed records at the end and can possibly cause Out Of Memory.Batch job instead provides a BatchResult in the on complete phase where you can get the count of failures and success. For huge file processing if order is not a concern definitely go ahead with Batch Job

records.Question__c: A Mule application is deployed to a cluster of two(2) cusomter-hosted Mule runtimes. Currently the node name Alice is the primary node and node named bob is the secondary node. The mule application has a flow that polls a directory on a file system for new files.The primary node Alice fails for an hour and then restarted.After the Alice node completely restarts, from what node are the files polled, and what node is now the primary node for the cluster?
records.A__c:
Files are polled from Alice node

Bob is the now the primary node
records.B__c:
Files are polled from Alice node

Alice is now the primary node
records.C__c:
Files are polled form Bob node

Bob is now the primary node
records.D__c:
Files are polled form Bob node

Alice is now the primary node
records.Comment__c:
最適な選択肢は **(C): Files are polled from Bob node, Bob is now the primary node** です。


理由:

Muleの高可用性クラスタでは、プライマリノードが障害でダウンした場合、セカンダリノードがプライマリノードの役割を引き継ぎます。プライマリノードが再起動しても、セカンダリノードが引き継いだプライマリの役割はそのまま維持されます¹²。したがって、Aliceノードが再起動した後も、Bobノードがファイルをポーリングし続け、Bobノードがプライマリノードのままとなります。


¹: [Mule Runtime High Availability (HA) Cluster Overview](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mule-runtime/latest/mule-high-availability-ha-clusters)

²: [High Availability and Disaster Recovery | MuleSoft Documentation](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mule-runtime/4.4/hadr-guide)

records.Question__c: A mule application is deployed to a Single Cloudhub worker and the public URL appears in Runtime Manager as the APP URL.Requests are sent by external web clients over the public internet to the mule application App url. Each of these requests routed to the HTTPS Listener event source of therunning Mule application.Later, the DevOps team edits some properties of this running Mule application in Runtime Manager.Immediately after the new property values are applied in runtime manager, how is the current Mule application deployment affected and how will future web client requests to the Mule application be handled?
records.A__c: Cloudhub will redeploy the mule application to the OLD Cloudhub worker New web client requests are ROUTED to the OLD Cloudhub worker BOTH before and afterthe Mule application is redeployed.
records.B__c: Cloudhub will redeploy the Mule application to the OLD Cloudhub worker New web client requests will RETURN AN ERROR until the Mule application is redeployed to the OLD Cloudhub worker
records.C__c: CloudHub will redeploy the Mule application to a NEW Cloudhub worker New web client requests will RETURN AN ERROR until the NEW Cloudhub worker is available

records.Question__c: A Mule application is synchronizing customer data between two different database systems.What is the main benefit of using XA transaction over local transactions to synchronize these two database system?
records.A__c: Ensure consistency
records.B__c: Reduce latency
records.C__c: Increase throughput
records.D__c: Simplifies communincation
records.Comment__c:
最適な選択肢は **(A): Ensure consistency** です。


理由は、XAトランザクションは複数のデータベースシステム間でデータの一貫性を確保するために使用されるからです。XAトランザクションは、2フェーズコミットプロトコルを使用して、すべての参加データベースが同じ状態にコミットされるか、またはロールバックされることを保証します¹²³。これにより、データの不整合が発生するリスクが大幅に減少します。


他の選択肢についても簡単に説明します：

- **(B): Reduce latency**：XAトランザクションは、複数のシステム間での同期を行うため、むしろレイテンシーが増加することがあります。

- **(C): Increase throughput**：複雑な同期処理が必要なため、スループットが向上するわけではありません。

- **(D): Simplifies communication**：通信を簡素化するわけではなく、むしろ複雑化することがあります。


このように、XAトランザクションの主な利点はデータの一貫性を確保することです。

records.Question__c: A Mule application name Pub uses a persistence object store. The Pub Mule application is deployed to Cloudhub and it configured to use Object Store v2.Another Mule application name sub is being developed to retrieve values from the Pub Mule application persistence object Store and will also be deployed to cloudhub. What is the most direct way for the Sub Mule application to retrieve values from the Pub Mule application persistence object store with the least latency?
records.A__c: Use an object store connector configured to access the Pub Mule application persistence object store
records.B__c: Use a VM connector configured to directly access the persistence queue of the Pub Mule application persistence object store.
records.C__c: Use an Anypoint MQ connector configured to directly access the Pub Mule application persistence object store
records.D__c: Use the Object store v2 REST API configured to access the Pub Mule application persistence object store.
records.Comment__c:
* The Object Store V2 API enables API access to Anypoint Platform Object Store v2.* You can configure a Mule app to use the Object Store REST API to store and retrieve values from an object store in another Mule app. However, Object Store v2 is not designed for app-to-app communication. To share data between two Mule4 apps, use a queue in Anypoint MQ.* The Object Store v2 APIs enable you to use REST to perform the following:- Retrieve a list of object stores and keys associated with an application.- Store and retrieve key-value pairs in an object store.- Delete key-value pairs from an object store.- Retrieve Object Store usage statistics for your organization.- Object Store provides these APIs:Object Store APIObject Store Stats APIReference:Additional Info:When to use Object Store and when to use VM










最適な選択肢は **(D): Use the Object store v2 REST API configured to access the Pub Mule application persistence object store** です。


**理由**:

Object Store v2 REST APIを使用することで、Pub Muleアプリケーションの永続性オブジェクトストアに直接アクセスできます。REST APIは、クラウド環境でのアプリケーション間通信において、最も一般的で効率的な方法の一つです。これにより、Sub Muleアプリケーションは低遅延でデータを取得でき、他の選択肢よりも直接的かつ迅速なアクセスが可能です¹²。

records.Question__c: A mule application uses an HTTP request operation to involve an external API.The external API follows the HTTP specification for proper status code usage.What is possible cause when a 3xx status code is returned to the HTTP Request operation from the external API?
records.A__c: The request was NOT RECEIVED by the external API
records.B__c: The request was not accepted by the external API
records.C__c: The request was ACCEPTED by the external API
records.D__c: The request was Redirected to a different URL by the external API
records.Comment__c:
最適な選択肢は **(D): The request was Redirected to a different URL by the external API** です。


理由：

HTTPの3xxステータスコードはリダイレクトを示します。これは、クライアントがリソースを取得するために別のURLにリクエストを送信する必要があることを意味します。例えば、301（Moved Permanently）や302（Found）などのステータスコードが含まれます。したがって、3xxステータスコードが返された場合、リクエストは外部APIによって別のURLにリダイレクトされたことを示しています。

records.Question__c: A Mule application uses the Database connector.What condition can the Mule application automatically adjust to or recover from without needing to restart or redeploy the Mule application?
records.A__c: The credentials for accessing the database have been updated and the previous credentials are no longer valid
records.B__c: The database server was unavailable for four hours due to a major outage but is now fully operational again
records.C__c: The database server has been updated and hence the database driver library/JAR needs a minor version upgrade
records.D__c: One of the stored procedures being called by the Mule application has been renamed
records.Comment__c:
最適な選択肢は **(B)** です。


**理由**:

Muleアプリケーションは、データベースサーバーが一時的に利用できなくなった場合でも、自動的に再接続を試みる機能を持っています。したがって、データベースサーバーが4時間の大規模な障害から復旧した場合、Muleアプリケーションは再起動や再デプロイを必要とせずに自動的に接続を再確立することができます。

records.Question__c: A project team is working on an API implementation using the RAML definition as a starting point. The team has updated the definition to include new operations and has published a new version to exchange. Meanwhile another team is working on a mule application consuming the same API implementation.During the development what has to be performed by the mule application team to take advantage of the newly added operations?
records.A__c: Update the REST connector from exchange in the client application
records.B__c: Scaffold API implementation application with the new definition

records.D__c: Update the API connector in the API implementation and publish to exchange

最適な選択肢は (a): update the rest connector from exchange in the client application です。

理由: Muleアプリケーションチームが新しく追加された操作を利用するためには、クライアントアプリケーション内でExchangeから最新のRESTコネクタを更新する必要があります。これにより、新しいRAML定義に基づいた最新のAPI操作を利用できるようになります12。

他の選択肢について:

  • (b) はAPI実装アプリケーションのスキャフォールドに関するもので、クライアントアプリケーションには関係ありません。
  • © はクライアントアプリケーションのスキャフォールドに関するもので、既存のアプリケーションを更新するための手順ではありません。
  • (d) はAPIコネクタの更新とExchangeへの再公開に関するもので、クライアントアプリケーション側の操作ではありません。

このように、クライアントアプリケーションが新しい操作を利用するためには、最新のRESTコネクタを更新することが最適です。

1: MuleSoft Documentation 2: MuleSoft API Design




スキャフォールド（scaffold）とは、一般的に「足場」を意味します。特にITやソフトウェア開発の分野では、スキャフォールドはプロジェクトの初期設定や基本構造を自動生成するツールやプロセスを指します。これにより、開発者は基本的なコードや設定を迅速に作成し、プロジェクトの開発を効率化することができます12。

例えば、APIのスキャフォールドを行うと、基本的なエンドポイントやデータモデルが自動的に生成され、開発者はその上に具体的な機能を追加していくことができます。

records.Question__c: A rale limiting policy has been applied to a soap VI.2 API published in Clondhub. The API implementation catches errors in a global error handler on error propagate in the main flow for HTTP: RETRY_EXHAUSTED with HTTP status set to 429 and any with the HTTP status set to 500.What is the expected HTTP status when the client exceeds the quota of the API calls?

records.Question__c: A system API EmployeeSAPI is used to fetch employee's data from an underlying SQL database.The architect must design a caching strategy to query the database only when there is an update to the employees stable or else return a cached response in order to minimize the number of redundant transactions being handled by the database.What must the architect do to achieve the caching objective?
records.A__c:
Use a Scheduler with a fixed frequency every hour triggering an invalidate cache flow

Use an object store caching strategy and set expiration interval to 1-hour
records.B__c:
Use an On Table Row on employees table and call invalidate cache

Use an object store caching strategy and expiration interval to empty
records.C__c:
Use a Scheduler with a fixed frequency every hour triggering an invalidate cache flow

Use an object store caching strategy and expiration interval to empty
records.D__c:
Use an on table rule on employees table call invalidate cache and said new employees data to cache

Use an object store caching strategy and set expiration interval to 1-hour
records.Comment__c:
最適な選択肢は **(B)** です。


理由：

選択肢 (B) は、従業員テーブルの行に変更があった場合にキャッシュを無効化するためのトリガーを設定し、キャッシュの有効期限を空に設定することで、データベースの更新があったときのみキャッシュを無効化し、最新のデータを取得することができます。これにより、不要なデータベーストランザクションを最小限に抑えることができます。


MuleSoftの「On Table Row」機能は、データベーステーブルから定期的にデータを取得し、各行ごとにメッセージを生成する操作です。この機能は、特定の間隔でテーブルをポーリングし、新しいデータが追加された場合にそのデータを処理します12。

主な特徴は以下の通りです：

  • 定期的なポーリング: 指定した間隔でテーブルをチェックし、新しい行を取得します。
  • ウォーターマーク列: ウォーターマーク列を指定することで、前回のポーリング以降に追加された行のみを取得することができます。
  • ID列: ID列を指定することで、同じ行が重複して処理されないようにします。
  • スケジューリング: ポーリングの頻度を設定することができます（例：cronジョブや固定間隔）12.

この機能を使用することで、データベースの変更をリアルタイムで検出し、効率的に処理することが可能です。

records.Question__c: An API client is implemented as a Mule application that includes an HTTP Request operation using a default configuration. The HTTP Request operation invokes an external API that follows standard HTTP status code conventions, which causes the HTTP Request operation to return a 4xx status code.What is a possible cause of this status code response?
records.A__c: An error occurred inside the external API implementation when processing the HTTP request that was received from the outbound HTTP Request operation of the Mule application
records.B__c: The external API reported that the API implementation has moved to a different external endpoint
records.C__c: The HTTP response cannot be interpreted by the HTTP Request operation of the Mule application after it was received from the external API
records.D__c: The external API reported an error with the HTTP request that was received from the outbound HTTP Request operation of the Mule application
records.Comment__c: Correct choice is: "The external API reported an error with the HTTP request that was received from the outbound HTTP Request operation of the Mule application" Understanding HTTP 4XX Client Error Response Codes : A 4XX Error is an error that arises in cases where there is a problem with the user's request, and not with the server.Such cases usually arise when a user's access to a webpage is restricted, the user misspells the URL, or when a webpage is nonexistent or removed from the public's view.In short, it is an error that occurs because of a mismatch between what a user is trying to access, and its availability to the user - either because the user does not have the right to access it, or because what the user is trying to access simply does not exist. Some of the examples of 4XX errors are400 Bad Request The server could not understand the request due to invalid syntax. 401 Unauthorized Although the HTTP standard specifies "unauthorized", semantically this response means "unauthenticated". That is, the client must authenticate itself to get the requested response. 403 Forbidden The client does not have access rights to the content; that is, it is unauthorized, so the server is refusing to give the requested resource. Unlike 401, the client's identity is known to the server. 404 Not Found The server can not find the requested resource. In the browser, this means the URL is not recognized. In an API, this can also mean that the endpoint is valid but the resource itself does not exist. Servers may also send this response instead of 403 to hide the existence of a resource from an unauthorized client. This response code is probably the most famous one due to its frequent occurrence on the web. 405 Method Not Allowed The request method is known by the server but has been disabled and cannot be used. For example, an API may forbid DELETE-ing a resource. The two mandatory methods, GET and HEAD, must never be disabled and should not return this error code. 406 Not Acceptable This response is sent when the web server, after performing server-driven content negotiation, doesn't find any content that conforms to the criteria given by the user agent. The external API reported that the API implementation has moved to a different external endpoint cannot be the correct answer as in this situation 301 Moved Permanently The URL of the requested resource has been changed permanently. The new URL is given in the response. ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- In Lay man's term the scenario would be: API CLIENT -> MuleSoft API - HTTP request "Hey, API.. process this" -> External API API CLIENT

records.Question__c: An API has been updated in Anypoint Exchange by its API producer from version 3.1.1 to 3.2.0 following accepted semantic versioning practices and the changes have been communicated via the API's public portal. The API endpoint does NOT change in the new version. How should the developer of an API client respond to this change?
records.A__c: The update should be identified as a project risk and full regression testing of the functionality that uses this API should be run.
records.B__c: The API producer should be contacted to understand the change to existing functionality.
records.C__c: The API producer should be requested to run the old version in parallel with the new one.
records.D__c: The API client code ONLY needs to be changed if it needs to take advantage of new features.
records.Comment__c: * Semantic Versioning is a 3-component number in the format of X.Y.Z, where :X stands for a major version.Y stands for a minor version:Z stands for a patch.So, SemVer is of the form Major.Minor.Patch Coming to our question , minor version of the API has been changed which is backward compatible. Hence there is no change required on API client end. If they want to make use of new featured that have been added as a part of minor version change they may need to change code at their end. Hence correct answer is The API client code ONLY needs to be changed if it needs to take advantage of new features.

records.Question__c: An API implementation is being designed that must invoke an Order API which is known to repeatedly experience downtime. For this reason a fallback API is to be called when the Order API is unavailable. What approach to designing invocation of the fallback API provides the best resilience?
records.A__c: Redirect client requests through an HTTP 303 temporary redirect status code to the fallback API whenever the Order API is unavailable
records.B__c: Set an option in the HTTP Requester component that invokes the order API to instead invoke a fallback API whenever an HTTP 4XX or 5XX response status code is received from Order API
records.C__c: Create a separate entry for the order API in API manager and then invoke this API as a fallback API if the primary Order API is unavailable
records.D__c: Search Anypoint Exchange for a suitable existing fallback API and them implement invocations to their fallback API in addition to the Order API
records.Comment__c: * Resilience testing is a type of software testing that observes how applications act under stress. It's meant to ensure the product's ability to perform in chaotic conditions without a loss of core functions or data; it ensures a quick recovery after unforeseen, uncontrollable events.* In case an API invocation fails - even after a certain number of retries - it might be adequate to invoke a different API as a fallback. A fallback API, by definition, will never be ideal for the purpose of the API client, otherwise it would be the primary API.* Here are some examples for fallback APIs:- An old, deprecated version of the same API.- An alternative endpoint of the same API and version (e.g. API in another CloudHub region).- An API doing more than required, and therefore not as performant as the primary API.- An API doing less than required and therefore forcing the API Client to offer a degraded service, which is still better than no service at all.* API clients implemented as Mule applications offer the 'Until Successful Scope and Exception' strategies at their disposal, which together allow configuring fallback actions such as a fallback API invocation.* All HTTP response status codes within the 3xx category are considered redirection messages. These codes indicate to the user agent (i.e. your web browser) that an additional action is required in order to complete the request and access the desired resourceHence correct answer is Redirect client requests through an HTTP 303 temporary redirect status code to the fallback API whenever the Order API is unavailable

records.Question__c: An external REST client periodically sends an array of records in a single POST request to a Mule application API endpoint.The Mule application must validate each record of the request against a JSON schema before sending it to a downstream system in the same order that it was received in the array Record processing will take place inside a router or scope that calls a child flow. The child flow has its own error handling defined. Any validation or communication failures should not prevent further processing of the remaining records.To best address these requirements what is the most idiomatic(used for it intended purpose) router or scope to used in the parent flow, and what type of error handler should be used in the child flow?
records.A__c:
Parallel For Each scope in the parent flow

On Error Propagate error handler in the child flow
records.B__c:
For Each scope in the parent flow

On Error Continue error handler in the child flow
records.C__c:
First Successful router in the parent flow

On Error Continue error handler in the child flow
records.D__c:
Until Successful router in the parent flow

On Error Propagate error handler in the child flow
records.Comment__c:
最適な選択肢は **(B): For Each scope in the parent flow, On Error Continue error handler in the child flow** です。


**理由:**

- **For Each scope** は、配列内の各レコードを順番に処理するため、元の順序を保ちながら処理を行うことができます。

- **On Error Continue error handler** は、エラーが発生しても他のレコードの処理を続行するため、1つのレコードのエラーが他のレコードの処理を妨げることがありません。


この組み合わせにより、各レコードのバリデーションと処理が確実に行われ、エラーが発生しても他のレコードの処理が中断されないようになります。

records.Question__c: An insurance company is implementing a MuleSoft API to get inventory details from the two vendors. Due to network issues, the invocations to vendor applications are getting timed-out intermittently. But the transactions are successful upon reprocessing What is the most performant way of implementing this requirement?
records.A__c:
Implement Round-Robin scope to invoke the two vendor applications on two different routes

Use the Try-Catch scope to implement retry mechanism for timeout errors on each route
records.B__c:
Implement a For-Each scope to invoke the two vendor applications

Use until successful scope to implement the retry mechanism for the timeout errors
records.C__c:
Implement a Choice scope to invoke the two vendor applications on two different route

Use the try-catch scope to implement the retry mechanism for timeout errors on each route
records.D__c:
Implement a scatter-gather scope to invoke the two vendorapplications on two different route

Use the Until-Successful scope to implement the retry mechanismfor timeout errors on each route
records.Comment__c:
最適な選択肢は **(D)** です。


**理由**:

- **Scatter-Gather Scope**: このスコープは、複数のルートを並行して実行するため、2つのベンダーアプリケーションへの呼び出しを同時に行うことができます。これにより、全体の処理時間が短縮され、パフォーマンスが向上します。

- **Until-Successful Scope**: このスコープは、指定された条件が満たされるまで再試行を行うため、タイムアウトエラーが発生した場合でも、再試行によって成功するまで処理を続けることができます。これにより、ネットワークの不安定さに対処しつつ、確実にトランザクションを完了させることができます。


この組み合わせにより、パフォーマンスと信頼性の両方を確保することができます。

records.Question__c: An Integration Mule application is being designed to synchronize customer data between two systems. One system is an IBM Mainframe and the other system is a Salesforce Marketing Cloud (CRM) instance. Both systems have been deployed in their typical configurations, and are to be invoked using the native protocols provided by Salesforce and IBM.What interface technologies are the most straightforward and appropriate to use in this Mute application to interact with these systems, assuming that Anypoint Connectors exist that implement these interface technologies?
records.A__c: IBM: DB access CRM: gRPC
records.B__c: IBM: REST CRM:REST
records.C__c: IBM: Active MQ CRM: REST
records.D__c: IBM: CICS CRM: SOAP
records.Comment__c:
Correct answer is IBM: CICS CRM: SOAP* Within Anypoint Exchange, MuleSoft offers the IBM CICS connector. Anypoint Connector for IBM CICS Transaction Gateway (IBM CTG Connector) provides integration with back-end CICS apps using the CICS Transaction Gateway.* Anypoint Connector for Salesforce Marketing Cloud (Marketing Cloud Connector) enables you to connect to the Marketing Cloud API web services (now known as the Marketing Cloud API), which is also known as the Salesforce Marketing Cloud. This connector exposes convenient operations via SOAP for exploiting the capabilities of Salesforce Marketing Cloud.



最適な選択肢は **(D): IBM: CICS CRM: SOAP** です。


**理由:**

1. **IBM Mainframeとの連携**: IBM CICS (Customer Information Control System) は、IBMメインフレーム上で動作するトランザクション処理システムです。CICSは、メインフレーム環境でのデータアクセスやトランザクション管理に最適化されており、Anypoint Connectorsを使用することで、効率的かつ信頼性の高い連携が可能です²。


2. **Salesforce Marketing Cloudとの連携**: Salesforce Marketing Cloudは、SOAP APIを提供しており、これを使用することで、データの読み書きや操作が可能です。SOAPは、Salesforceの標準的なプロトコルの一つであり、信頼性とセキュリティが高い通信を実現します¹。


この組み合わせにより、両システムのネイティブプロトコルを活用し、最も効率的かつ信頼性の高いデータ同期が実現できます。


¹: [MuleSoft-Salesforce Integration Best Practices](https://blogs.mulesoft.com/api-integration/security/mulesoft-salesforce-integration-best-practices/)

²: [How to integrate IBM CICS Mainframe | MuleSoft](https://www.mulesoft.com/resources/api/ibm-cics-mainframe-integration)


ソース: Copilot との会話、 2024/7/29

records.Question__c: An integration Mute application is being designed to process orders by submitting them to a backend system for offline processing. Each order will be received by the Mute application through an HTTPS POST and must be acknowledged immediately. Once acknowledged, the order will be submitted to a backend system. Orders that cannot be successfully submitted due to rejections from the backend system will need to be processed manually (outside the backend system).The Mule application will be deployed to a customer-hosted runtime and is able to use an existing ActiveMQ broker if needed.The backend system has a track record of unreliability both due to minor network connectivity issues and longer outages.What idiomatic (used for their intended purposes) combination of Mule application components and ActiveMQ queues are required to ensure automatic submission of orders to the backend system, while minimizing manual order processing?
records.A__c:
An On Error scope

Non-persistent VM

ActiveMQ Dead Letter Queue for manual processing
records.B__c:
Until Successful component

MuleSoft Object Store

ActiveMQ is NOT needed or used
records.C__c:
An On Error scope

MuleSoft Object Store

ActiveMQ Dead Letter Queue for manual processing
records.D__c:
Until Successful component

ActiveMQ long retry Queue

ActiveMQ Dead Letter Queue for manual processing
records.Comment__c:
最適な選択肢は **(D): Until Successful component ActiveMQ long retry Queue ActiveMQ Dead Letter Queue for manual processing** です。


理由:

1. **Until Successful component**: このコンポーネントは、バックエンドシステムへの注文の送信が成功するまで再試行を続けるため、ネットワークの一時的な問題や短期間の障害に対して効果的です。

2. **ActiveMQ long retry Queue**: 長期間の再試行キューを使用することで、バックエンドシステムが一時的に利用できない場合でも、注文が失われることなく再試行され続けます。

3. **ActiveMQ Dead Letter Queue**: 再試行がすべて失敗した場合、注文はデッドレターキューに送られ、手動で処理することができます。これにより、注文が完全に失われることを防ぎます。


この組み合わせにより、バックエンドシステムへの自動送信が確実に行われ、手動での注文処理を最小限に抑えることができます。

records.Question__c: An Order microservice and a Fulfillment microservice are being designed to communicate with their clients through message-based integration (and NOT through API invocations).The Order microservice publishes an Order message (a kind of command message) containing the details of an order to be fulfilled. The intention is that Order messages are only consumed by one Mule application, the Fulfillment microservice.The Fulfillment microservice consumes Order messages, fulfills the order described therein, and then publishes an OrderFulfilled message (a kind of event message). Each OrderFulfilled message can be consumed by any interested Mule application, and the Order microservice is one such Mule application.What is the most appropriate choice of message broker(s) and message destination(s) in this scenario?
records.A__c:
Order messages are sent to a JMS queue

OrderFulfilled messages are sent to a JMS topic

Both microservices interact with the same JMS provider (message broker) instance, which must therefore scale to support the load of both microservices
records.B__c:
Order messages are sent to an Anypoint MQ exchange

OrderFulfilled messages are sent to an Anypoint MQ queue

Both microservices interact with Anypoint MQ as the message broker, which must therefore scale to support the load of both microservices
records.C__c:
Order messages are sent to a JMS queue

OrderFulfilled messages are sent to a JMS topic

The Order microservice interacts with one JMS provider (message broker) and the Fulfillment microservice interacts with a different JMS provider, so that both message brokers can be chosen and scaled to best support the load of each microservice
records.D__c:
Order messages are sent directly to the Fulfillment microservices

OrderFulfilled messages are sent directly to the Order microservice

The Order microservice interacts with one AMQP-compatible message broker and the Fulfillment microservice interacts with a different AMQP-compatible message broker, so that both message brokers can be chosen and scaled to best support the load of each microservice
records.Comment__c:
https://www.examtopics.com/discussions/mulesoft/view/60838-exam-mcia-level-1-topic-1-question-31-discussion/



最適な選択肢は **(A)** です。


**理由:**

- **Orderメッセージ**は1つのFulfillmentマイクロサービスによってのみ消費されるため、JMSキューを使用することで、メッセージが確実に1回だけ消費されることが保証されます。

- **OrderFulfilledメッセージ**は複数のMuleアプリケーションによって消費される可能性があるため、JMSトピックを使用することで、メッセージが複数の消費者に配信されることが可能になります。

この構成により、メッセージの確実な配信とスケーラビリティが確保され、システムの信頼性と効率性が向上します。

records.Question__c: An organization has decided on a cloudhub migration strategy that aims to minimize the organizations own IT resources. Currently, the organizational has all of its Mule applications running on its own premises and uses an premises load balancer that exposes all APIs under the base URL https://api.acme.com As part of the migration strategy, the organization plans to migrate all of its Mule applications and load balancer to cloudhub What is the most straight-forward and cost effective approach to the Mule applications deployment and load balancing that preserves the public URLs?
records.A__c:
Deploy the Mule applications to Cloudhub

Update the CNAME record for an api.acme.com in the organizations DNS server pointing to the A record of a cloudhub dedicated load balancer(DLB)

Apply mapping rules in the DLB to map URLs to their corresponding Mule applications
records.B__c:
Deploy the Mule applications to Cloudhub

Update the CNAME record for api.acme.com in the organization DNS server pointing to the A record of the cloudhub shared load balancer(SLB)

Apply mapping rules in the SLB to map URLs to their corresponding Mule applications.
records.C__c:
For each migrated Mule application, deploy an API proxy Mule application to Cloudhub with all applications under the control of a dedicated load balancer(CLB)

Update the CNAME record for api.acme.com in the organization DNS server pointing to the A record of a cloudhub dedicated load balancer(DLB)

Apply mapping rules in the DLB to map each API proxy application to its corresponding Mule applications
records.D__c:
Deploy the Mule applications to Cloudhub

Create CNAME record for api.acme.com in the Cloudhub

Shared load balancer (SLB) pointing to the A record of the on-premise load balancer

Apply mapping rules in the SLB to map URLs to their corresponding Mule applications
records.Comment__c:
最適な選択肢は **(B)** です。


**理由:**

選択肢 (B) は、Mule アプリケーションを CloudHub にデプロイし、組織の DNS サーバーで `api.acme.com` の CNAME レコードを CloudHub の共有ロードバランサー (SLB) の A レコードにポイントする方法です。この方法は、以下の理由で最もシンプルでコスト効果が高いです。


1. **コスト効率**: 共有ロードバランサー (SLB) を使用することで、専用ロードバランサー (DLB) を使用する場合に比べてコストが抑えられます。

2. **シンプルな設定**: SLB を使用することで、複雑な設定や追加のプロキシアプリケーションのデプロイが不要になります。

3. **URL の保持**: 公開 URL (`https://api.acme.com`) を保持しながら、CloudHub 上でのアプリケーションのデプロイとロードバランシングが可能です。


この方法により、組織の IT リソースを最小限に抑えつつ、効率的なクラウド移行が実現できます。

records.Question__c: An organization has implemented the cluster with two customer hosted Mule runtimes is hosting an application.This application has a flow with a JMS listener configured to consume messages from a queue destination. records.Question__c: An organization has strict unit test requirement that mandate every mule application must have an MUnit test suit with a test case defined for each flow and a minimum test coverage of 80%.A developer is building Munit test suit for a newly developed mule application that sends API request to an external rest API.What is the effective approach for successfully executing the Munit tests of this new application while still achieving the required test coverage for the Munit tests?

records.B__c: Invoke the external endpoint of the rest API from the mule floors
records.C__c: Mark the rest API invocations in the Munits and then call the mocking service flow that simulates standard responses from the REST API

records.Question__c: An organization has various integrations implemented as Mule applications. Some of these Mule applications are deployed to custom hosted Mule runtimes (on-premises) while others execute in the MuleSoft-hosted runtime plane (CloudHub). To perform the Integra functionality, these Mule applications connect to various backend systems, with multiple applications typically needing to access the backend systems.How can the organization most effectively avoid creating duplicates in each Mule application of the credentials required to access the backend systems?
records.A__c: Create a Mule domain project that maintains the credentials as Mule domain-shared resources Deploy the Mule applications to the Mule domain, so the credentials are available to the Mule applications
records.B__c: Store the credentials in properties files in a shared folder within the organization's data center Have the Mule applications load properties files from this shared location at startup
records.C__c: Segregate the credentials for each backend system into environment-specific properties files Package these properties files in each Mule application, from where they are loaded at startup
records.D__c: Configure or create a credentials service that returns the credentials for each backend system, and that is accessible from customer-hosted and MuleSoft-hosted Mule runtimes Have the Mule applications toad the properties at startup by invoking that credentials service
records.Comment__c:
* "Create a Mule domain project that maintains the credentials as Mule domain-shared resources" is wrong as domain project is not supported in Cloudhub


* We should Avoid Creating duplicates in each Mule application but below two options cause duplication of credentials

- Store the credentials in properties files in a shared folder within the organization's data center. Have the Mule applications load properties files from this shared location at startup

- Segregate the credentials for each backend system into environment-specific properties files. Package these properties files in each Mule application, from where they are loaded at startup So these are also wrong choices


* Credentials service is the best approach in this scenario. Mule domain projects are not supported on CloudHub. Also its is not recommended to have multiple copies of configuration values as this makes difficult to maintain Use the Mule Credentials Vault to encrypt data in a .properties file. (In the context of this document, we refer to the .properties file simply as the properties file.) The properties file in Mule stores data as key-value pairs which may contain information such as usernames, first and last names, and credit card numbers. A Mule application may access this data as it processes messages, for example, to acquire login credentials for an external Web service. However, though this sensitive, private data must be stored in a properties file for Mule to access, it must also be protected against unauthorized - and potentially malicious - use by anyone with access to the Mule application

records.Question__c: An organization is creating a set of new services that are critical for their business. The project team prefers using REST for all services but is willing to use SOAP with common WS-" standards if a particular service requires it. What requirement would drive the team to use SOAP/WS-* for a particular service?
records.A__c: Must publish and share the service specification (including data formats) with the consumers of the service
records.B__c: Must secure the service, requiring all consumers to submit a valid SAML token
records.C__c: Must support message acknowledgement and retry as part of the protocol
records.D__c: Must use XML payloads for the service and ensure that it adheres to a specific schema
records.Comment__c:
https://free-braindumps.com/mulesoft/free-mcia-level-1-braindumps.html?p=8


説明：SAML（Security Assertion Markup Language）は、ID プロバイダ（IdP）がサービス・ プロバイダ（SP）に認証クレデンシャルを渡すことを可能にするオープン標準である。 SAML トランザクションは、ID プロバイダとサービス・プロバイダ間の標準化された通信に XML（Extensible Markup Language）を使用する。

WS-Security は、基本的なユーザ名／パスワード認証情報、SAML、OAuth など、多くの認証モデルをサポートする重要な拡張である。 SOAP API を認証する一般的な方法は、SAML シングルサインオン（SSO）である。 SAML は、アプリケーション間で認証と認可のクレデンシャルの交換を容易にすることで機能する。 しかし、REST Web サービスに SAML を追加する方法を記述した仕様はない。


最適な選択肢は (b): must secure the service, requiring all consumers to submit a valid SAML token です。

理由： SOAP（Simple Object Access Protocol）とWS-*（Web Services Standards）は、セキュリティや信頼性の高いメッセージングを必要とする場合に適しています。特に、SAML（Security Assertion Markup Language）トークンを使用してサービスを保護する必要がある場合、SOAPはその標準的なセキュリティ機能を提供します。RESTは軽量でシンプルですが、SOAPはより高度なセキュリティ機能を持っているため、このような要件にはSOAPが適しています。

records.Question__c: An organization is designing a Mule application to periodically poll an SFTP location for new files containing sales order records and then process those sales orders. Each sales order must be processed exactly once.To support this requirement, the Mule application must identify and filter duplicate sales orders on the basis of a unique ID contained in each sales order record and then only send the new sales orders to the downstream system.What is the most idiomatic (used for its intended purpose) Anypoint connector, validator, or scope that can be configured in the Mule application to filter duplicate sales orders on the basis of the unique ID field contained in each sales order record?
records.A__c: Configure a watermark In an On New or Updated File event source to filter unique records by the order ID
records.B__c: Configure an Idempotent Message Validator component to filter each record by the order ID
records.C__c: Configure a Database connector to filter and store each record by the order ID
records.D__c: Configure a Cache scope to filter and store each record from the received file by the order ID
records.Comment__c:
最適な選択肢は (B) Idempotent Message Validator コンポーネントを使用して、各レコードを注文IDでフィルタリングする です。

理由: Idempotent Message Validator コンポーネントは、メッセージの一意性を保証するために設計されています。このコンポーネントは、特定のフィールド（この場合は注文ID）に基づいてメッセージをフィルタリングし、重複するメッセージを除外します。これにより、各注文が一度だけ処理されることが保証されます1。他の選択肢も有効ですが、Idempotent Message Validator はこの特定のユースケースに最も適しています。

何か他にお手伝いできることはありますか？

records.Question__c: An organization is designing a mule application to support an all or nothing transaction between serval database operations and some other connectors so that they all roll back if there is a problem with any of the connectors Besides the database connector , what other connector can be used in the transaction.
records.A__c: VM
records.B__c: Anypoint MQ
records.C__c: SFTP
records.D__c: ObjectStore
records.Comment__c:
Correct answer is VM VM support Transactional Type. When an exception occur, The transaction rolls back to its original state for reprocessing. This feature is not supported by other connectors.Here is additional information about Transaction management:







最適な選択肢は (a): vm です。

理由: Muleアプリケーションで「all or nothing」トランザクションをサポートするためには、トランザクション管理が可能なコネクタが必要です。VMコネクタは、Muleのトランザクション管理をサポートしており、複数のデータベース操作や他のコネクタと一緒にトランザクションを構成することができます12。これにより、いずれかのコネクタで問題が発生した場合に、すべての操作がロールバックされるように設定できます。

他の選択肢（Anypoint MQ、SFTP、ObjectStore）は、トランザクション管理をサポートしていないため、このシナリオには適していません。

1: MuleSoft Documentation - Transaction Management 2: MuleSoft Documentation - Transactions

records.Question__c: An organization is designing an integration solution to replicate financial transaction data from a legacy system into a data warehouse (DWH).The DWH must contain a daily snapshot of financial transactions, to be delivered as a CSV file. Daily transaction volume exceeds tens of millions of records, with significant spikes in volume during popular shopping periods.What is the most appropriate integration style for an integration solution that meets the organization's current requirements?
records.A__c: Event-driven architecture
records.B__c: Microservice architecture
records.C__c: API-led connectivity
records.D__c: Batch-triggered ETL
records.Comment__c:
Correct answer is Batch-triggered ETL Within a Mule application, batch processing provides a construct for asynchronously processing larger-than-memory data sets that are split into individual records. Batch jobs allow for the description of a reliable process that automatically splits up source data and stores it into persistent queues, which makes it possible to process large data sets while providing reliability. In the event that the application is redeployed or Mule crashes, the job execution is able to resume at the point it stopped.



最適な選択肢は (d): batch-triggered etl です。

理由:

  • 大量データの処理: 毎日のトランザクション量が数千万件を超えるため、バッチ処理は大量データを効率的に処理するのに適しています。
  • スナップショットの作成: データウェアハウスに日次スナップショットを作成する要件があるため、バッチ処理はこの要件に合致します。
  • ピーク時の対応: ショッピング期間中のトランザクション量の急増にも対応できる柔軟性があります。

他の選択肢はリアルタイム処理やサービス分割に焦点を当てており、日次スナップショットの要件には適していません。

records.Question__c: An organization is designing the following two Mule applications that must share data via a common persistent object store instance:- Mule application P will be deployed within their on-premises datacenter.- Mule application C will run on CloudHub in an Anypoint VPC.The object store implementation used by CloudHub is the Anypoint Object Store v2 (OSv2).what type of object store(s) should be used, and what design gives both Mule applications access to the same object store instance?
records.A__c: Application C and P both use the Object Store connector to access a persistent object store
records.B__c:
Application C uses the Object Store connector to access a persistent object

Application P accesses the persistent object store via the Object Store REST API
records.C__c:
Application P uses the Object Store connector to access a persistent object store

Application C accesses this persistent object store via the Object Store REST API through an IPsec tunnel
records.D__c: Application C and P both use the Object Store connector to access the Anypoint Object Store v2
records.Comment__c:
最適な選択肢は (B) です。

理由:

  • Application C は CloudHub 上で動作し、Anypoint Object Store v2 (OSv2) を使用するため、Object Store コネクタを使用してアクセスできます。
  • Application P はオンプレミスのデータセンターにデプロイされており、OSv2 に直接アクセスすることはできませんが、Object Store REST API を介してアクセスすることができます12。

この設計により、両方の Mule アプリケーションが同じオブジェクトストアインスタンスにアクセスできるようになります。

records.Question__c: An organization is migrating all its Mule applications to Runtime Fabric (RTF). None of the Mule applications use Mule domain projects.Currently, all the Mule applications have been manually deployed to a server group among several customer hosted Mule runtimes.Port conflicts between these Mule application deployments are currently managed by the DevOps team who carefully manage Mule application properties files. When the Mule applications are migrated from the current customer-hosted server group to Runtime Fabric (RTF), to the Mule applications need to be rewritten and what DevOps port configuration responsibilities change or stay the same?
records.A__c:
Yes, the Mule applications Must be rewritten

DevOps No Longer needs to manage port conflicts between the Mule applications
records.B__c:
Yes, the Mule applications Must be rewritten

DevOps Must Still Manage port conflicts.
records.C__c:
NO, The Mule applications do NOT need to be rewritten

DevOps MUST STILL manage port conflicts
records.D__c:
NO, the Mule applications do NO need to be rewritten

DevOps NO LONGER needs to manage port conflicts between the Mule applications.
records.Comment__c:
* Anypoint Runtime Fabric is a container service that automates the deployment and orchestration of your Mule applications and gateways.

* Runtime Fabric runs on customer-managed infrastructure on AWS, Azure, virtual machines (VMs) or bare-metal servers.

* As none of the Mule applications use Mule domain projects. applications are not required to be rewritten. Also when applications are deployed on RTF, by default ingress is allowed only on 8081.

* Hence port conflicts are not required to be managed by DevOps team



最適な選択肢は (D): NO, the Mule applications do NO need to be rewrittenDevOps NO LONGER needs to manage port conflicts between the Mule applications です。

理由: Runtime Fabric (RTF) に移行する際、Mule アプリケーションは再書き込みの必要がありません。RTF はコンテナ化された環境であり、各アプリケーションは独立したコンテナ内で実行されるため、ポートの競合は発生しません12。これにより、DevOps チームはポート競合の管理から解放されます3。

1: Deploying Mule Apps to Runtime Fabric Using Runtime Manager 2: Deploy Applications to Runtime Fabric Using the Mule Maven Plugin 3: Migration to RTF - Mule

records.Question__c: An organization is not meeting its growth and innovation objectives because IT cannot deliver projects last enough to keep up with the pace of change required by the business. According to MuleSoft's IT delivery and operating model, which step should the organization lake to solve this problem?
records.A__c: Switch from a design-first to a code-first approach for IT development
records.B__c: Modify IT governance and security controls so that line of business developers can have direct access to the organization's systems of record
records.C__c: Hire more |T developers, architects, and project managers to increase IT delivery
records.D__c: Adopt a new approach that decouples core IT projects from the innovation that happens within each line of business
records.Comment__c:
最適な選択肢は (D): Adopt a new approach that decouples core IT projects from the innovation that happens within each line of business です。

理由としては、MuleSoftのITデリバリーモデルでは、コアITプロジェクトを各事業部門内でのイノベーションから切り離す新しいアプローチを採用することが推奨されています。このアプローチにより、中央のIT部門はシステムの運用、接続、および抽象化に集中でき、事業部門は既存の資産を活用し、新しいソリューションを迅速に開発することが可能になります1。これにより、ITのデリバリーギャップを埋め、ビジネスの成長とイノベーションの目標を達成することができます1。

records.Question__c: An organization is using Mulesoft cloudhub and develops API's in the latest version. As a part of requirements for one of the API's, third party API needs to be called. The security team has made it clear that calling any external API needs to have include listing As an integration architect please suggest the best way to accomplish the design plan to support these requirements?
records.A__c: Implement the Any point filter processor to implement the include list IP
records.B__c: Implement a proxy for the third party API and enforce the IPinclude list policy and call this proxy from the flow of the API
records.C__c: Implement includelist IP on the cloudhub VPC firewall to allow the traffic
records.D__c: Implement the validation of includelisted IP operation
records.Comment__c:
最適な選択肢は (B): Implement a proxy for the third party API and enforce the IP include list policy and call this proxy from the flow of the API です。

理由:

  • セキュリティの強化: プロキシを使用することで、第三者APIへのアクセスを制御し、IPインクルードリストポリシーを適用することができます。これにより、セキュリティチームの要件を満たしつつ、外部APIへの安全なアクセスが可能になります。
  • 柔軟性: プロキシを介することで、将来的にIPリストの変更や他のセキュリティポリシーの適用が容易になります。
  • 管理の一元化: プロキシを使用することで、APIフロー内での管理が一元化され、メンテナンスや監視が簡単になります。

この方法は、セキュリティと管理の両面で最適なソリューションとなります。

records.Question__c: An organization's IT team must secure all of the internal APIs within an integration solution by using an API proxy to apply required authentication and authorization policies. Which integration technology, when used for its intended purpose, should the team choose to meet these requirements if all other relevant factors are equal?
records.A__c: Robotic Process Automation (RPA)
records.B__c: Integration Platform-as-a-service (PaaS)
records.C__c: API Management (APIM)
records.D__c: Electronic Data Interchange (EDI)
records.Comment__c:
最適な選択肢は ©: API Management (APIM) です。

理由： API Management (APIM) は、APIのセキュリティ、認証、認可を管理するための専用ツールです。APIMを使用することで、APIプロキシを通じて必要な認証および認可ポリシーを適用し、内部APIを保護することができます。他の選択肢（RPA、iPaaS、EDI）はそれぞれ異なる目的に特化しており、APIのセキュリティ管理には適していません。

records.Question__c: An organization uses a four(4) node customer hosted Mule runtime cluster to host one(1) stateless api implementation. The API is accessed over HTTPS through a load balancer that uses round-robin for load distribution. Each node in the cluster has been sized to be able to accept four(4) times the current number of requests.Two(2) nodes in the cluster experience a power outage and are no longer available. The load balancer directs the outage and blocks the two unavailable the nodes from receiving further HTTP requests.What performance-related consequence is guaranteed to happen to average, assuming the remaining cluster nodes are fully operational?
records.A__c: 100% increase in the average response time of the API
records.B__c: 50% reduction in the throughput of the API
records.C__c: 100% increase in the number of requests received by each remaining node
records.D__c: 50% increase in the JVM heap memory consumed by each remaining node
records.Comment__c: * "100% increase in the throughput of the API" might look correct, as the number of requests processed per second might increase, but is it guaranteed to increase by 100%? Using 4 nodes will definitely increase throughput of system. But it is cant be precisely said if there would be 100% increase in throughput as it depends on many other factors. Also it is nowhere mentioned in the description that all nodes have same CPU/memory assigned. The question is about the guaranteed behavior * Increasing number of nodes will have no impact on response time as we are scaling application horizontally and not vertically. Similarly there is no change in JVM heap memory usage. * So Correct answer is 50% reduction in the number of requests being received by each node This is because of the two reasons. 1) API is mentioned as stateless 2) Load Balancer is used

records.Question__c: An organization uses a set of customer-hosted Mule runtimes that are managed using the Mulesoft-hosted control plane. What is a condition that can be alerted on from Anypoint Runtime Manager without any custom components or custom coding?
records.A__c: When a Mule runtime on a given customer-hosted server is experiencing high memory consumption during certain periods
records.B__c: When a Mule runtime's customer-hosted server is about to run out of disk space
records.C__c: When the Mute runtime license installed on a Mule runtime is about to expire
records.D__c: When an SSL certificate used by one of the deployed Mule applications is about to expire
records.Comment__c:
Correct answer is When a Mule runtime on a given customer-hosted server is experiencing high memory consumption during certain periods Using Anypoint Monitoring, you can configure two different types of alerts


:Basic alerts for servers and Mule apps Limit per organization:

Up to 50 basic alerts for users who do not have a Titanium subscription to Anypoint Platform You can set up basic alerts to trigger email notifications when a metric you are measuring passes a specified threshold. You can create basic alerts for the following metrics for servers or Mule apps: For on-premises servers and CloudHub apps: * CPU utilization * Memory utilization * Thread count Advanced alerts for graphs in custom dashboards in Anypoint Monitoring. You must have a Titanium subscription to use this feature. Limit per organization: Up to 20 advanced alerts

records.Question__c: An organization will deploy Mule applications to Cloudhub, Business requirements mandate that all application logs be stored ONLY in an external splunk consolidated logging service and NOT in Cloudhub.In order to most easily store Mule application logs ONLY in Splunk, how must Mule application logging be configured in Runtime Manager, and where should the log4j2 splunk appender be defined?
records.A__c:
Disable Cloudhub logging in Runtime Manager

Define the splunk appender in EACH Mule application's log4j2.xml file
records.B__c:
Disable Cloudhub logging in Runtime Manager

Define the splunk appender in ONE global log4j.xml file that is uploaded once to Runtime Manger to support at Mule application deployments.
records.C__c:
Keep thedefault logging configuration in Runtime Manager

Define the Splunk appender in EACH Mule application log4j2.xml file
records.D__c:
Keep the default logging configuration in RuntimeManager

Define the splunk appender in ONE global log4j.xml file that is uploaded once to Runtime Manager to support at Mule application deployments.
records.Comment__c:
最適な選択肢は (A) です。

理由:

  • Cloudhubのログを無効化することで、ログがCloudhubに保存されるのを防ぎます。
  • 各Muleアプリケーションのlog4j2.xmlファイルにSplunkアペンダを定義することで、各アプリケーションのログが直接Splunkに送信されるように設定できます12。

この方法により、ビジネス要件である「すべてのアプリケーションログを外部のSplunkにのみ保存し、Cloudhubには保存しない」という条件を満たすことができます。

1: MuleSoft Splunk Integration 2: HowTo – Report analytics from Mule Runtime using Splunk

records.Question__c: Anypoint Exchange is required to maintain the source code of some of the assets committed to it, such as Connectors, Templates, and API specifications.What is the best way to use an organization's source-code management (SCM) system in this context?
records.A__c: Organizations can continue to use an SCM system of their choice for branching and merging, as long as they follow the branching and merging strategy enforced by Anypoint Exchange
records.B__c: Organizations should continue to use an SCM system of their choice, in addition to keeping source code for these asset types in Anypoint Exchange, thereby enabling parallel development, branching, and merging
records.C__c: Organizations need to use Anypoint Exchange as the main SCM system to centralize versioning and avoid code duplication
records.D__c: Organizations need to point Anypoint Exchange to their SCM system so Anypoint Exchange can pull source code when requested by developers and provide it to Anypoint Studio
records.Comment__c:
最適な選択肢は (B) です。

理由: Anypoint Exchangeにソースコードを保持しつつ、組織が選択したSCMシステムを並行して使用することで、開発の柔軟性が向上します。これにより、ブランチングやマージなどの操作を効率的に行うことができ、複数の開発者が同時に作業を進めることが可能になります。また、Anypoint Exchangeにソースコードを保持することで、必要なときに簡単にアクセスできるため、管理が容易になります。
